KV.description: Stores auth codes, upload records, and quota counters (separated by key prefix). The name is cosmetic.

DISCOURSE_ORIGIN.description: Your forum's full URL, e.g. `https://forum.example.com` (no trailing slash).

CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.description: Only needed for Cloudflare Stream. Dashboard → Workers & Pages → Account ID. Leave blank if using Mux only.

DISCOURSE_CONNECT_SECRET.description: Paste the same value into Discourse's `discourse connect provider secrets`.

COOKIE_SECRET.description: **Required.** Any long random string (`openssl rand -hex 32`). Signs the broker's auth cookies.

DISCOURSE_WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: Optional. Enables nightly cleanup of deleted videos. Must match the secret on your Discourse Post webhook. Leave blank to disable.

CLOUDFLARE_STREAM_TOKEN.description: Cloudflare Stream only. API token with **Stream: Edit** (My Profile → API Tokens). Leave blank if not using Cloudflare Stream.

MUX_TOKEN_ID.description: Mux only. Mux → Settings → API Access Tokens (with **Mux Video** read/write). Leave blank if not using Mux.

MUX_TOKEN_SECRET.description: Mux only. The secret half of the Mux API token. Leave blank if not using Mux.

MUX_WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: Mux only. Signing secret of the Mux webhook you create. Leave blank if not using Mux.
